items.title: Cross-asset positioning remains mixed
items.summary: Equities show selective resilience while macro-sensitive assets reflect a more cautious tone.
items.relevance: Why it matters: alignment is incomplete.

items.title: Macro calendar focus stays elevated
items.summary: Participants remain attentive to inflation, rates, and liquidity conditions rather than isolated price moves.

items.title: Narrative leadership remains fragmented
items.summary: No single theme dominates broadly enough to justify emotional positioning.
items.relevance: Why it matters: avoid theme attachment.
